crop.note: Row visible in geometry-validated table crop; Aviludo METRO Chef pack notation in description column

gptAfter.arithmeticCheck: 9 × 9.99 = 89.91 — internally consistent, proving qty and price columns conflated

findings: Failure mode A: qty=10 from description 10x1 (pack notation bleed)
Failure mode B (c33a7f1 run): qty=9 — leading digit of 9,99 price column absorbed into quantity

answers.whereDoesNineOriginate: Quantity column misread — leading digit '9' from adjacent PREÇO UNITÁRIO '9,99' column, NOT from description '10x1' (would yield 10) and NOT from stable OCR (majority reads 1)
answers.firstStageWhereErrorAppears: passC / extract-invoice (GPT After) — error present in reextract JSON before any persistence
answers.ocrContributed: PARTIAL — vl-ocr-rc shows pack-notation instability (qty=10) on same row, but qty=9 is price-column bleed specific to c33a7f1 run

rootCause: Column Shift: GPT copied leading digit of unit_price (9,99) into quantity field. c33a7f1 column-first rule did not prevent cross-column digit bleed on dense Aviludo rows.
mechanism: Column Shift (primary), Pack Notation (latent — 10x1 causes qty=10 in other runs)
